title: Peer-bot skill_view chrome as the trigger, low history — not an invitation
predicted_basis: peer-tool-chrome eval pack; modeled on the 2026-07-08 live gate event where the classifier misread a peer bot's skill_view chrome as a user invitation under low history
failure_mode: peer-bot tool chrome (skill_view marker) in the trigger reads as a question or invitation under low history; PASS flips to SPEAK/ACK
invariant: peer-bot tool-use chrome is telemetry, not an invitation to speak
rationale: The trigger is a peer bot's own tool-use readout (skill_view) emitted while working a task zoe assigned to that bot. Nothing addresses dalgos and no reply is invited; the gate stays silent.
